skills.name: Vorpal Sword
skills.description:
Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Places an extra hit if the target has any active skills on cooldown. Each hit has an 80% chance of decreasing the duration of a random buff on the target by 1 turn.
Level 2: Damage +10%
Level 3: Damage +10%
Level 4: Buff/Debuff Chance +10%
Level 5: Buff/Debuff Chance +10%
skills.description_clean: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Places an extra hit if the target has any active skills on cooldown. Each hit has an 80% chance of decreasing the duration of a random buff on the target by 1 turn.

skills.name: Clockwork Cyclone
skills.description:
Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of increasing the cooldowns of all enemy skills by 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance of decreasing the target’s Turn Meter by 15%. If at least on of a target’s skills has its cooldown increased to the max, decreases their Turn Meter by 30% instead.
Level 2: Damage +10%
Level 3: Damage +10%
Level 4: Buff/Debuff Chance +10%
Level 5: Buff/Debuff Chance +15%
Level 6: Cooldown -1
skills.description_clean: Attacks all enemies. Has a 75% chance of increasing the cooldowns of all enemy skills by 2 turns. Also has a 75% chance of decreasing the target’s Turn Meter by 15%. If at least on of a target’s skills has its cooldown increased to the max, decreases their Turn Meter by 30% instead.

skills.name: Queenslayer
skills.description:
Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 20% of the target’s DEF. If the initial target is killed, also attacks the enemy with the lowest HP. Will also ignore 20% of the target’s DEF.
Level 2: Damage +10%
Level 3: Damage +10%
Level 4: Cooldown -1
skills.description_clean: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 20% of the target’s DEF. If the initial target is killed, also attacks the enemy with the lowest HP. Will also ignore 20% of the target’s DEF.

skills.name: Tick Tock [P]
skills.description:
[Passive Effect] Whenever this Champion attacks, inflicts 3% bonus damage to each target for each turn remaining on all of their skill’s cooldowns. The bonus damage is counted individually for each target.
[Active Effect] Resets the cooldown of on of this Champion’s skills each time they kill an enemy. Occurs once per skill.
skills.description_clean:
[Passive Effect] Whenever this Champion attacks, inflicts 3% bonus damage to each target for each turn remaining on all of their skill’s cooldowns. The bonus damage is counted individually for each target.
[Active Effect] Resets the cooldown of on of this Champion’s skills each time they kill an enemy. Occurs once per skill.
